subject: Fw: Marina Inventory
body:
----- Forwarded Message -----
From: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
To: lesw@limitedbrands.com 
Sent: Wednesday, February 7, 2007 4:12 PM
Subject: Fw: Marina Inventory
 


thought you might find what we own interesting


----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, February 7, 2007 1:28:57 PM
Subject: FW: Marina Inventory

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey 
Epstein
 
 


________________________________
 From: Farkas, Andrew 
[mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, February 07, 2007 1:17 
PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Marina 
Inventory


JE wanted 
this:
Marina Cabo San 
Lucas
RodneyBay , St. 
Lucia
Antigua Yacht Club (in 
contract)
SimpsonBayYacht Club 
(St. Maarten)
Yacht Haven Grande ( St. 
Thomas )
AmericanYacht Harbor ( St. 
Thomas )
Village Cay Marina ( Tortola )
Little Dix Bay (Virgin 
Gorda)
Hurricane Hole Marina ( Paradise 
Island , Bahamas )
Nassau British Colonial 
(contract)
Montauk Yacht 
Club
Muskat Marina ( Muskat , Oman )
IGY Anchor Marina (Palm Jumeirah,  Dubai )
Scarlino Marina ( Tuscany , Italy – in 
contract)
